name: Zucchini Maple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a loaf pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. Whisk together the flours, wheat germ, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
4. Add the walnuts, raisins, and sesame seeds; stir gently until combined.
5. In another bowl, beat the egg, egg white, brown sugar, granulated sugar, oil, and maple extract with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
6. Gradually add the buttermilk and maple extract to the batter, mixing until just combined.
7. Stir in the flour mixture and zucchini by hand until combined.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing it and slicing.
Per slice: 183 calories and 2.8 grams fat.
